title: ACEF Risk Register Payload
description: Payload schema for risk_register records. Captures risk identification and assessment entries per EU AI Act Art. 9 and NIST MAP/MEASURE. Supports the management_review and post_market_monitoring_plan payload variants via the review_type discriminator field.

risk_id.description: Unique identifier for this risk within the organization's risk management system.

description.description: Human-readable description of the identified risk.

category.description: Risk category aligned with EU AI Act Art. 9(2) and NIST AI RMF.

likelihood.description: Estimated likelihood of the risk materializing.

severity.description: Estimated severity if the risk materializes.

risk_level.description: Overall risk level derived from likelihood and severity.

assessment_method.description: Method used to assess this risk (e.g., 'qualitative_matrix', 'quantitative_model', 'expert_judgment').

identified_by.description: Person or team that identified this risk (name or actor_ref URN).

status.description: Current status of this risk entry.

residual_risk_level.description: Risk level after treatments have been applied.

residual_risk_justification.description: Justification for accepting the residual risk level.

residual_risk_approver.description: Person or authority who approved the residual risk acceptance.

related_risk_ids.description: IDs of related risks in the register.

review_type.description: Discriminator for payload variants. 'management_review' for Art. 9 management review records, 'post_market_monitoring_plan' for post-market monitoring plans.

review_date.description: Date of the management review or monitoring event (ISO 8601).

review_attendees.description: List of attendees at the management review.

review_decisions.description: Decisions made during the management review.

review_signatories.description: Signatories of the management review minutes.

monitoring_trigger_conditions.description: Conditions that trigger post-market monitoring actions.

monitoring_data_sources.description: Data sources used for post-market monitoring.

linked_risk_ids.description: Risk IDs linked to this review.
